svg.text: Harness Portability — Multi-Agent Code Project Health Inspector
Supervisor Dispatches | Four Harnesses | One Shared Session | Cost-Guarded | MLflow Traced
claude-sdk | claude-sonnet-4-6 | Clones repo, dispatches inspectors, assembles report
Detects or asks for GitHub URL, delegates all inspection work to sub-agents
🔗 One Shared Session — All Agents Share Context, Files, and Cloned Repo
PolicyEngine — cost_guard ($5.00) + tool_call_limit (250/sub-agent) — Evaluates in the Runner
All four sub-agents analyze the same cloned repository. Supervisor writes the final report.
A / B / C / D / F per category
🔄 Harness Portability — Each sub-agent runs on a different harness out of the box
To swap a sub-agent's harness, change one line in its config.yaml. Same session tree. Same guardrails. Same report.
📊 MLflow Tracing — mlflow.db → http://localhost:5000 — Traces claude-sdk + codex calls
